perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man wearing a yellow t-shirt and a grey flat cap stands indoors next to a white refrigerator, looking directly at the camera with an expressive, slightly surprised face while holding a smartphone. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of the smartphone screen showing hands swiping to close applications and navigating the control center to toggle Airplane Mode and Low Power Mode. (3) The man demonstrates removing a translucent phone case and shows a small external cooling fan attachment. (4) The man stands back by the refrigerator, gesturing emphatically with his hands and a wooden bead bracelet while warning against placing the phone inside the fridge or using cold water.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, energetic male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, expressing concern about overheating phones. (2) Accentuating sound effects like 'swish' and 'pop' occur alongside scene transitions. The male speaker provides rapid-fire instructions on cooling techniques. (3) The vocal intensity increases as he lists common mistakes, followed by a brief 'ding' sound effect at the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c有意思tim哥' (3C Interesting Tim Brother) and social media handles in the top left corner. (2) Hook Text: '夏天手機超燙怎麼辦?' (What to do when the phone is super hot in summer?) in a yellow box with a fire emoji. (3) Functional Text: 'Apple警告! 超過35度 iPhone可能永久損壞!!' (Apple Warning! Above 35 degrees iPhone may be permanently damaged!!) appearing with an alarmist tone. (4) Decorative Text: List of steps like '關閉不必要的APP' (Close unnecessary apps), '停止充電' (Stop charging), and '拿掉手機殼' (Take off phone case). (5) Warning Text: '用冰水沖?? 錯' (Rinse with ice water?? Wrong) and '冷氣出風口 放在那邊? 也錯' (Put by the AC vent? Also wrong) with large red 'X' graphics.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Problem Identification -> Step-by-Step Tutorial -> Common Myths/Warnings -> Conclusion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator identified as Tim哥 appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An adult male wearing a bright yellow t-shirt with a logo, a grey flat cap, glasses, and several bracelets (including wooden beads).

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A minimalist indoor setting featuring a white refrigerator with energy labels, off-white walls, and beige curtains.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Problem -> Solution List -> Debunking -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To educate smartphone users (specifically iPhone owners) on the correct technical procedures to cool down a device during high summer temperatures, while emphatically warning against common but harmful DIY methods like refrigeration or water exposure.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video provides general technical advice without focusing on a specific third-party product brand for sale, though it focuses on Apple devices.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: The character 'Tim哥' has a distinct visual style involving flat caps and bright t-shirts, combined with high-energy Mandarin delivery common in tech review channels.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes 'variety-show' style editing with bold text overlays and cartoonish sound effects to maintain high viewer engagement for a short-form tutorial.
